entries.name: Diclonius
entries.content: Diclonius are a mutated human species and the next step in evolution. They are distinguished by two bone-like horns on their heads and the presence of 'Vectors'—invisible, telekinetic arms. While they appear human, Diclonius possess an instinctual drive to exterminate humanity, though this is often a result of the trauma they endure from human cruelty.

entries.name: Vectors
entries.content: Vectors are the primary weapon of a Diclonius. They are invisible, telekinetic appendages that can pass through solid objects or vibrate at high frequencies to slice through anything. Each Diclonius has a different number and range of vectors (e.g., Lucy has 4 with a 2m range). Vectors can also be used for defense, such as deflecting bullets.

entries.name: The Diclonius Research Institute
entries.content: The Diclonius Research Institute is a secret facility dedicated to the study, containment, and eventual eradication or weaponization of Diclonius. Led by Director Kakuzawa, the institute subjects Diclonius to horrific experiments. It is the primary site of Lucy's trauma and the source of her vengeful nature.

entries.name: The Diclonius Virus
entries.content: Diclonius can 'infect' humans via their vectors. When a human is touched by a vector, their DNA is altered such that any offspring they have will be born as Silpelits—sterile, female Diclonius that lack the reproductive capacity of a Queen like Lucy. This is the primary method by which the Diclonius plan to replace humanity.
